items.title: India launches ‘Op Amistad’ to aid quake-hit Venezuela; sends relief material, medical assistance
items.summary: The 41-member team, comprising experienced rescue personnel and medical professionals, will work closely with the Venezuelan authorities in search and rescue operations

items.title: US judge holds prosecutor in contempt in Charlie Kirk murder case
